{{Quote|That's the ''Amerce''. That's the ''Anlage''.|New Republic [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]] points out the destroyed vessels|<ref name="Eclipse" />}}
The '''''Amerce''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under construction at the [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|shipyards]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] during the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], as the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] away from completion, [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces [[Battle of Fondor|attacked]] the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. The unfinished ''Amerce'' was destroyed when enemy [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] committed [[Ramming/Legends|suicide runs]] on the Star Destroyer and its [[Orbital Shipyard 1321|construction site]].

==Description==
The ''Amerce'' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. It was never completed before its destruction.<ref name="Eclipse" />

==History==
{{Quote|How do they expect us to finish the ''Amerce'' if we're asleep on our feet for most of our shifts?|Creed Mitsun complains about space-raid drills|<ref name="Eclipse" />}}
Construction on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] Star Destroyer ''Amerce'' began at the [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]]<ref name="Eclipse" /> close to the beginning<ref name="Note">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' establishes that the ''Amerce'' was worked on for the better part of a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before its destruction during the [[Battle of Fondor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[25 ABY/Legends|25.7 ABY]]. Therefore, the ''Amerce''{{'s}} construction began close to the beginning of 25 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].<ref name="TNEC" /> One of thirty Star Destroyers being created at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] [[Orbital Shipyard 1321]],<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|27|''Amerce''}}</ref> the ''Amerce'' was worked on by tens of thousands of [[shipfitter]]s, augmented by [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and machinery, with the work consisting of multiple double shifts in [[Gravity/Legends|zero-g]] conditions. The laborers [[Sleep/Legends|slept]] in Orbital Shipyard 1321, but frequent [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-raid drills meant that many of the workers toiled on short rest. Foreman [[Creed Mitsun]] was one of the workers building the ''Amerce'', leading a team of [[Electrician/Legends|electricians]]. Labor on the ''Amerce'' lasted the majority of a [[Standard year/Legends|year]]—at a [[Time/Legends|time]] when the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were invading [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]—and the ''Amerce'' was soon estimated to be only a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] away from completion.<ref name="Eclipse" />

However, the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Fondor|attacked]] the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]]<ref name="Eclipse" /> in 25.7 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].<ref name="TNEC" /> While the invaders' [[Warship/Legends|warships]] engaged the New Republic's [[New Republic First Fleet|First Fleet]], Yuuzhan Vong [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] commenced [[Ramming/Legends|suicide runs]] on the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] and the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] being constructed there. The attacks left the ''Amerce'' a holed hulk, and other New Republic warships under construction, such as the ''[[Anlage]]'', succumbed to the attack as well. Although the shipyards suffered heavy damage, the New Republic ultimately drove off the Yuuzhan Vong with the help of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].<ref name="Eclipse" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Amerce'' appeared in [[2000]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse|''Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'']], a novel written by [[James Luceno]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Eclipse" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
